name: Holiday Shortbread Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, and salt. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
2. Pat the dough into an ungreased 15-inch x 10-inch x 1-inch baking pan.
3. Prick the dough all over with a fork.
4. Bake at 325°F for 35 minutes or until the center is set.
5. Allow to cool to room temperature, then cut into small squares.
If cooking for two: Cookies will keep in a storage tin or an airtight container for several weeks.
